proposal.working_title: Anthropic Mythos Explained: What SMB Leaders Must Know About AI-Enabled Cyber Threats
proposal.one_line_angle: Bain framed the Anthropic Mythos report for Fortune 500 CISOs; SMBs need the same intelligence translated into a practical, budget-conscious hardening playbook for the AI stacks they are already running.
outline_bullets: What the Anthropic Mythos disclosure actually revealed about AI-orchestrated cyberattacks and why SMBs are the softest target
Where mid-market AI adoption programs fall short: three security gaps the Mythos playbook exposes in typical SMB implementations
A 30 day hardening roadmap for AI-powered SMB stacks: identity, prompt-injection defenses, vendor review, and incident response
